description_long: This clock tower features a rectangular wooden body with a rich, dark finish, accented by metallic gold trim and decorative finials at each corner. The front face displays a large, circular clock with Arabic numerals, ornate gold hands, and concentric decorative rings, all set against a cream-colored background. The top of the tower is crowned with a prominent, smooth dome, also finished in dark wood and topped with a gold finial. The sides and back of the tower are plain, lacking any windows or additional ornamentation, emphasizing the stately and solid construction. The base is supported by four rounded feet, each capped with gold, adding to the object's sense of permanence and grandeur. The overall design suggests a blend of Neoclassical and traditional European influences, making it a striking focal point in any urban setting.
description: A stately, dark wood clock tower with gold accents, a domed roof, and a large ornate clock face on the front. The design is elegant and traditional, with decorative finials and a solid, rectangular body.
description_view_0: The front view shows the ornate clock face with gold hands and numerals, framed by gold trim and topped with a domed roof and decorative finials.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain wooden panel with gold trim, the dome and finials visible above, and no clock face or additional features.
description_view_2: The back view displays a solid wooden panel with gold trim, the dome and finials prominent, and no visible clock face or ornamentation.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain wooden panel, gold trim, and the dome with finials, with no clock face present.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is large, circular, and cream-colored with gold concentric rings and Arabic numerals marking the hours. The hands are ornate and gold, with a decorative center. The face is bordered by a gold ring, and the overall design is elegant and traditional.
